name: mnemo
description: The trust layer for AI agent self-improvement, native to Claude Code: auto-curated cross-session memory, self-forged skills, and FTS5 episodic recall over every past session — but every lesson carries provenance + a trust score, is challenged by an independent verifier before it sticks (poisoned ones quarantined), re-checked by a falsifiable probe, and the skill library is auto-consolidated by a curator. Bounded, auditable, on your own subscription.
